items.name: Severity
items.doc: Severity level of a scanner issue — currently only Error is used.

items.name: Issue
items.doc: A single violation found by the scanner — file, line, column, rule ID, and message.

items.name: error
items.signature: pub fn error(file: &Path, line: usize, col: usize, rule: &str, message: String) -> Self
items.doc: Create an Error-severity issue at the given file location with rule ID and message.
